name: Calvice Survival
short_description: Calvice Survival is a 2D platform game in which at each level you will have to face numerous traps to recover the hair growth potions and thus save Trenzania.
detailed_description:
Calvice Survival si a simple 2D plataformer, the player is immersed in the world of Trenzania, where all the inhabitants have lost their hair. The main character embarks on an epic mission to save the world, going through different levels full of challenges and enemies.

To achieve his goal, the player must overcome each level, facing obstacles to obtain the precious magical hair potions. These potions are essential to restoring hair to the inhabitants of Trenzania and restoring the beauty and vitality of the land.

Throughout the adventure, the player will discover secrets, unlock special abilities, and face challenging final bosses. Get ready to live a unique and exciting experience as you become the hero who will save Trenzania from its baldness! Good luck on your mission!
